Plot signal evolution (Phase 2 placeholder)

plot_signal_evolution.Rd

Placeholder returning a ggplot with a note that signal evolution plotting is scheduled for Phase 2. Kept here so downstream code can rely on a stable API while the feature is implemented.

Usage

plot_signal_evolution(run_data)

Arguments

run_data

A list returned by get_run_data(). Currently unused.

Value

A ggplot2::ggplot() object with a single annotation.

Details

Plot signal evolution (Phase 2 placeholder)

See also

plot_run()

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
plot_signal_evolution(get_run_data(run_clade(default_specs())))
} # }

On this page
